description: Evidence field vocabulary for the Lumina pre-algebra module (gr 6-7). Extends the universal base fields with two deterministic diagnostic signals for Law 2 (Inverse Operations): step-order correctness and inequality-direction correctness. All fields are populated by the deterministic algebra parser tool — never by LLM estimation.

response_latency_sec.description: Wall-clock seconds from prompt delivery to response receipt. Universal base field.

off_task_ratio.description: Fraction of the response that does not engage with the current task. 0.0 = fully on-task, 1.0 = fully off-task. Universal base field.

correctness.description: Whether the subject's answer is correct, incorrect, or partially correct. Null when correctness cannot be determined.

hint_used.description: True if the subject's message explicitly requested or acknowledged a hint.

frustration_marker_count.description: Count of frustration signals detected in the subject's message.

repeated_error.description: True if the same error type was made in consecutive turns.

step_count.description: Number of distinct algebraic transformation steps shown in the subject's response.

min_steps.description: Minimum number of steps required for a correct solution to this task (from curriculum).

solution_value.description: The numeric or symbolic value extracted from the subject's proposed solution.

equivalence_preserved.description: True if each transformation step in the response preserves algebraic equivalence. Law 1 (Balance Principle).

reversibility_order_correct.description: True if the student removed the constant term (addition/subtraction) before dividing out the coefficient. False if the student divided the coefficient first. Null for single-step equations where no ordering decision is present. Deterministic: set by check_step_order tool call. Law 2 (Inverse Operations).

inequality_direction_correct.description: True if the student correctly flipped the inequality symbol when dividing or multiplying by a negative number. False if the symbol was not flipped when it should have been. Null when no negative multiplier or divisor was present in the solution. Deterministic: set by check_inequality_direction tool call. Law 2 (Inverse Operations — inequality variant).
